name: claude-skills
description: Personal user-scope Claude Code skills. Ships three runbook-style skills: internal-ca (2-tier PKI bootstrap with Vault, OCSP, CRL, Ansible deploy), mtls (server-trusts-client mutual TLS on top of internal-ca), and lxd-claude-setup (provision Claude Code on a headless LXD/Linux server including OAuth port-forward and TUI onboarding-loop fix).
